series_metadata.series_title: Analytical Toxicology Lab (ATL) Routine Lab Records
series_metadata.series_description: Routine Lab Records including but not limited to Accessioning Paperwork, Batch Paperwork, Chain of Custody Paperwork, and Cleared Folders. The Analytical Toxicology Laboratory (ATL) Administrative Professional 2 is the Record Retention Coordinator.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Keep for 2 years. ; Electronic: Keep for 2 years., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
